description: Legacy trading folder inventory for FQL factory intake

items.name: Golden Eye Bot v4 (Pine)
items.code_completeness: COMPLETE — full Pine strategy with backtesting
items.logic_summary: 3-8 AM EST consolidation zone. Trade breakout/retest at 8-10:30 AM. Includes ALGO number (round number) rejection entry.
items.overlap_with_fql: HIGH — very similar to FQL session breakout concept on MGC. The 3-8 AM zone is analogous to Asian range. May overlap with ORB-MGC-Long.
items.diversification_value: LOW — MGC intraday breakout already well-covered
items.conversion_effort: MEDIUM — Pine to Python, session zone logic needs translation

items.name: Golden Eye v5 Prop (Pine)
items.code_completeness: COMPLETE — v5 with prop firm guardrails
items.needs: Pine-to-Python conversion, prop rules are controller-layer not strategy-layer
items.logic_summary: Same zone breakout as v4 but with prop firm trailing DD sim, green-day lock, halt counters. 7-11:30 AM trade window.
items.overlap_with_fql: HIGH — same as LEGACY-001 plus prop logic that FQL handles in controller layer

items.name: Golden Eye Session Levels (Indicator)
items.code_completeness: COMPLETE — Pine indicator, not a strategy
items.needs: Not a strategy — session level visualization only
items.logic_summary: Draws 3-8 AM session zone highs/lows and round number levels

items.name: Golden Eye Backtest Engine (Python)
items.code_completeness: COMPLETE — Python backtest engine with optimizer
items.logic_summary: Legacy backtest engine with Monte Carlo, optimizer, prop sim. FQL has equivalent or better.
items.overlap_with_fql: FULL — FQL backtest engine already covers this

items.name: Luc Longmire Gold Strategies (Video/PDF)
items.code_completeness: NONE — video recordings, transcripts, PDF playbook only
items.needs: Manual extraction of rules from video/PDF, then spec, then code
items.logic_summary: Gold scalp strategy, NY session breakout, Bank Heist (FVG-based), SPX trade. ICT-style entry with session zones.
items.overlap_with_fql: MODERATE — gold session breakout partially covered. FVG/ICT approach previously failed in FQL (ICT-010).
items.conversion_effort: HIGH — extract rules from video, no code exists
